config.envMissing:
[config] .env not found at {path}
         Copy .env.example to .env and fill in your credentials.
config.configCopied:
[config] config.json not found - copied from config.example.json.
         Edit config.json (especially 'room') before running.
config.configMissing:
[config] config.json not found at {path}
         Copy config.example.json to config.json and edit it.
config.invalidRoom: [config] config.json: 'room' must be set to a valid room slug.

registry.botRoleMissingLog: Bot role too low for {command} (needs {role}, current level {level}).
registry.botRoleMissingReply: I need the {role} role to run {command}.
registry.userMissingRoleReply: {user}, you need the {role} role to use {command}.

help.description: List commands or show help for a command.

ping.description: Check if the bot is alive.

mod.cannotTargetBot: I can't use this command on the bot.
mod.cannotTargetPlatformRole: I can't apply this action to {user}; users with a platform role are not affected.

remove.description: Remove a user from the waitlist.

move.description: Move a user in the waitlist.

swap.description: Swap two users in the waitlist.
swap.notInQueue: Both users must be in the queue.
swap.samePosition: Users are already in the same position.

kick.description: Kick a user from the room.
kick.roleTooHigh: I can't kick {user}; their role is too high.

mute.roleTooHigh: I can't mute {user}; their role is too high.

ban.roleTooHigh: I can't ban {user}; their role is too high.

nuke.description: Delete all cached messages in the room.

delmsg.description: Delete all cached messages from a user.

lockchat.description: Lock the chat so only staff can talk.
lockchat.enabled: Chat locked. Only {role}+ can send messages.

afkremoval.description: Toggle AFK removal from the waitlist.

afklimit.description: Set the AFK limit in minutes.

afktime.description: Show how long a user has been AFK.

duelmute.description: Set the duel loser mute duration.

clearduel.description: Remove the duel mute from a user or everyone.
clearduel.notMuted: {user} does not have an active duel mute.
clearduel.clearedAll: Duel mutes cleared for all users.

warn.roleTooHigh: I cannot warn {user}; role too high.
warn.banBlockedPlatformRole: {user} reached {count}/{threshold} warnings, but users with platform roles cannot be banned by this action.

warnings.description: Show active warnings for a user.

give.description: Give points or VIP to a user.
give.vipHigherLevel: {user} already has a higher VIP active.
give.vipFailed: Could not apply VIP right now.

blacklist.addedSkipError: Added to blacklist, but failed to skip: {error}

voteskip.description: Start a vote to skip the current track.
voteskip.noPermission: I need the bouncer role to skip tracks.

nowplaying.description: Show the current track and reactions.

active.description: Show how many users chatted recently.

lastseen.description: Show when a user last spoke in chat.

jointime.description: Show how long a user has been in the room.
jointime.reply: {user} has been in the room for {duration}.

link.unavailable: No link available for this source.

mediaid.noId: Could not get a track ID.

autowoot-link.reply: Get the auto-woot extension here: https://woot.niceatc.api.br

dc.description: Restore a user's waitlist position after a DC.
usageLines: Let's do it: use !dc [user] and I'll try to rescue the spot.
Call me like this: !dc [user]. Recovery mode on.
Quick format: !dc [user]. Let's bring that position back.
dc.noPermission: You don't have permission to move another user.
noPermissionLines: Easy there, captain. Moving someone else requires bouncer+.
No VIP pass for moving others right now. Ask a bouncer and we roll.
That lever is for bouncer or above only. Queue safety first.
dc.noSnapshot: No recent snapshot for that user.
noSnapshotLines: I couldn't find a recent snapshot for that user.
I checked the DC trail, but nothing fresh showed up.
No saved checkpoint for that user right now.
expiredLines: DC window expired. We missed the timing this round.
Timeout. The snapshot is already out of the restore window.
That DC snapshot has expired. Next round we'll catch it sooner.
expiredNearLines: That was close 👀. The DC window expired just moments ago.
So close 👀. It expired by a tiny margin.
Almost had it 👀, but the restore window just closed.
invalidPositionLines: Saved position looks invalid, so I won't risk a bad move.
Snapshot has an invalid position. Better not scramble the queue.
Checkpoint issue: invalid position for restore.
dc.mustJoin: User must be in the waitlist.
mustJoinLines: First join the waitlist, then I'll restore the saved position.
I need the user in the waitlist right now to move them safely.
Get the user into the waitlist and I'll handle the DC right after.
dc.noDcDetected: I couldn't find a recent DC signal for that user.
noDcDetectedLines: No clear recent DC signal for that user, so I won't touch the queue.
Looks like there wasn't a valid DC right now. Better keep the queue as-is.
No recent evidence of a DC drop. Restore canceled for safety.
dc.alreadyRestored: That DC has already been restored for {user}.
alreadyRestoredLines: That restore was already applied for {user}. No infinite replay here 😄
I already restored this same DC for {user}. Let's avoid restore spam.
Checkpoint already recovered for {user}. No need to repeat this restore.
dc.alreadyBetterPosition: {user} is already in a better or equal position ({current}) than target ({target}).
alreadyBetterPositionLines: No reason to make position worse: {user} is already at {current}, target is {target}.
No moving backwards: {user} is already better at {current} than restore target {target}.
Restore canceled: {user} is already at {current}, which is better/equal than {target}.
movedLines: Recovery complete: {user} is now at position {position}.
movedNearLines: Whew 👀, just in time. {user} is back at position {position} ({remaining} left).
Right on the edge 👀, but it worked. {user} is at position {position}. {remaining} remaining.
Clock almost ran out 👀. {user} recovered position {position} with {remaining} to spare.
errorLines: I tried to recover it, but failed: {error}

insurance.description: Buy days of anti-steal protection (only counts days online).
insurance.active: Insurance active: {days} day(s) remaining (only counts online days).
insurance.maxDays: You can buy at most {max} days at once.
insurance.purchased: Bought {days} day(s) of insurance for {price} points. Total remaining: {total} day(s). {discount}

transfer.cannotTargetBot: I cannot transfer to the bot.

buy.vipUsageMessage: VIP usage: !buy vip <bronze|silver|gold> <daily|weekly|monthly|yearly>. Example: !buy vip bronze monthly
buy.vipNotFound: VIP plan not found for level {level} and duration {duration}.
buy.noPermission: I don't have permission to move the waitlist.
buy.noMove: No movement is possible right now.
buy.vipHigherLevel: You already have a higher VIP level active. Buy a plan of the same or higher level.
buy.vipActivateFailed: Could not activate VIP right now. Please try again.

work.noJob: You have not chosen a job yet.
work.upgradeOnly: You can only switch to a higher-level job.

steal.description: Try to steal points from someone.
steal.cannotTargetBot: I cannot steal from the bot.
steal.targetInsured: {user} is protected by insurance ({days} day(s) remaining).
steal.targetPoor: {user} does not have enough points to steal.
steal.bailPaid: You were caught and paid {amount} points bail.
steal.noPermission: No bail and no permission to mute.
steal.muted: You were jailed and muted for {minutes} min.

slots.jackpot: 🎰 {reels} | JACKPOT! {jackpot} points in the pot. Won {win} ({net}).

perfil.reply: Level {level} | XP {xp}/{next} ({remaining} left) | Next reward: {reward} points | Balance: {balance}.

vip.description: Show VIP status, plans, renewal and auto-renew.
vip.renewNoPlan: There is no saved renewal plan. Use !vip autorenew on <level> <duration> or buy VIP first.
vip.renewInsufficient: Insufficient balance to renew {plan}. It costs {price} points and you have {balance}.
vip.renewFailed: Could not renew VIP right now.
vip.autoNoPlan: There is no base plan for auto-renew. Provide level and duration, for example: !vip autorenew on bronze monthly
vip.autoEnabled: Auto-renew enabled for {plan}. When it expires and there is enough balance, the renewal will be applied on join.
vip.greetVipOnly: Custom greet is only available for users with active VIP.
vip.greetTooLong: The message can have at most {max} characters.
vip.greetNoMentionsLinks: Do not use @mentions or links in the custom greet.
vip.greetShowEmpty: You have not configured a custom greet.
vip.noActive: You do not have an active VIP.
vip.statusHint: Use !vip planos to view options, !buy vip <level> <duration> to purchase or !vip renew to renew.
vip.statusReply: VIP {level} active | expires in {remaining} | XP x{xp} | Economy x{economy} | Daily x{daily} | Work x{work} | DC x{dc}.

cards.plansFooter: Buy through the shop with !buy vip <level> <duration>. Example: !buy vip bronze monthly.

settings.noPermission: You need the manager role to use key {key}.

ghostbuster.description: Check if a user is in the room.

lyrics.description: Look up song lyrics on Genius. Without argument, uses the current track.
lyrics.usageMessage: Usage: !lyrics [song name] (no argument uses the current track)
lyrics.noApiKey: Genius API key is not configured.
lyrics.noTrack: No song is playing right now.
lyrics.error: Error fetching from Genius. Please try again.

alreadyOpenLines: Roulette is already spinning. No double launch.
Easy there, roulette is already live.
The chamber is already loaded. Just wait for the result.
Round already started. Chaos is in progress.
openedLines: Roulette is live! You have {seconds}s to join with !join.
Siren on: roulette open for {seconds}s. Type !join.
The arena is open for {seconds}s. Join with !join if you dare.
Chamber spinning for {seconds}s... !join now or watch from afar.
autoOpenedLines: Auto-roulette woke up on its own. {seconds}s to join with !join.
No warning, no mercy: auto-roulette is open for {seconds}s.
Fate pulled the trigger. Auto-roulette live for {seconds}s.
Automatic mode engaged: roulette open for {seconds}s. !join.
joinedLines: {name} joined and signed the risk waiver.
{name} stepped into the arena. No refunds.
leftLines: {name} decided to keep their dignity and left.
{name} walked out before the final click.
{name} left the roulette with heart rate at 200.

alreadyOpenLines: Chill, troll roulette is already live and trolling.
The trolling has begun. Troll roulette is open.
Stop — troll roulette is already running.
Chaos signal is already active. Troll roulette in progress.
troll.opened: Troll Roulette open for {seconds}s. Get in with !join!
openedLines: Attention trolls: Troll Roulette open for {seconds}s. !join now!
Nobody asked but Troll Roulette showed up for {seconds}s. !join.
The trolling begins: Troll Roulette for {seconds}s. Run to !join.
Troll Roulette is live! {seconds}s of pure mayhem. !join.
troll.autoOpened: Auto Troll Roulette started for {seconds}s. Use !join.
autoOpenedLines: System activated Troll Roulette! {seconds}s of pure chaos. !join.
Troll Roulette escaped its cage: {seconds}s to join with !join.
Auto-troll: {seconds}s of madness available. Run to !join.
joinedLines: {name} joined Troll Roulette and accepted the nonsense.
{name} took the bait and entered Troll Roulette.
{name} joined the troll game. Good luck.
leftLines: {name} bailed out of the trolling and left.
{name} surrendered and abandoned the prank zone.
{name} left Troll Roulette with mild emotional damage.

destiny.description: Open the destiny roulette (winner moves to position 2).
destiny.alreadyOpen: The destiny roulette has already chosen its victim.
alreadyOpenLines: Destiny is already in motion. Destiny Roulette is active.
The stars already aligned: Destiny Roulette is open.
The prophecy has been cast — the roulette is spinning.
The universe already opened the Destiny Roulette. Wait.
openedLines: Destiny calls! Destiny Roulette open for {seconds}s. !join.
The stars align for {seconds}s. Enter with !join.
The prophecy begins: {seconds}s to join with !join.
Destiny Roulette live for {seconds}s. The chosen one goes to second place!
destiny.autoOpened: Auto Destiny Roulette started for {seconds}s. Use !join.
autoOpenedLines: Destiny woke on its own: Destiny Roulette for {seconds}s. !join.
Automatic prophecy: {seconds}s of Destiny Roulette. Run to !join.
The universe decided by itself. Destiny Roulette: {seconds}s. !join.
joinedLines: {name} entered Destiny Roulette and let fate decide.
{name} stepped through the gate of destiny.
leftLines: {name} defied destiny and left the round.
{name} stepped back before the stars judged.
{name} left and passed the prophecy to others.

join.mustBeInQueue: You must be in the waitlist to join.

thor.description: Spin Thor's hammer on the waitlist.
thor.noPermission: I need the bouncer role for that.
thor.mustBeInQueue: You must be in the waitlist.
goodLines: Mjolnir spun true: {name} is worthy and goes to the top! ⚡
Thor smiled at {name}. One-way ticket to the top.
The Allfather approved {name}. Crown of the queue secured.
neutralLines: Thor watched {name}... and chose not to interfere.
Mjolnir passed by, but {name} stays put.
No thunder, no blessing: {name} remains in place.
A draw with the gods today. {name} survives.
badLines: Thor did not approve {name} today. Hammer down, out of queue! ⚡
Thunder struck hard: {name} was wiped from the queue.
Asgard rejected {name}'s application. Queue access revoked.

duel.description: Challenge a user to a duel.
duel.alreadyPending: A duel is already pending between {challenger} and {target} (expires in {seconds}s).
challengeLines: {challenger} threw down the gauntlet at {target}! {accept} or {recuse}.
Challenge declared: {challenger} vs {target}. Respond with {accept} or {recuse}.
Arena doors are open: {challenger} called out {target}. {accept} / {recuse}.
acceptedLines: {target} locked it in. Crowd goes wild.
Contract signed in metaphorical blood: {target} accepted.
{target} said 'bring it on'. Here we go.
suspenseLines: One mistake and this becomes legendary.
resultLines: Duel over: {winner} wins, {loser} walks it off.
The arena has chosen: {winner} triumphs over {loser}.
Victory for {winner}. {loser} will hear about this for weeks.
duel.noPermission: I need the bouncer role to apply duel mutes.
duel.deleteMessagesFallback: Messages from {user} will be deleted for {minutes} min.
duel.notTarget: This duel is not for you.
refusedLines: {target} refused and chose another day to fight.
cowardLines: Ran from the arena at top speed!
Tapped out before the first hit.

trivia.question: Trivia: {question}
trivia.noQuestion: Could not load a question right now.

evento.idle: No live event is active right now.
evento.alreadyRunning: A live event is already running.
evento.quizStarted: ⚡ Lightning quiz! Answer within {seconds}s and win {reward} points. [{category} | {difficulty}]
evento.quizStartedNoReward: ⚡ Quiz started! Answer in chat within {seconds}s. [{category} | {difficulty}]
evento.quizWon: {user} answered first! Correct answer: {answer}. Won {reward} points.
evento.quizExpired: Quiz time is over. Correct answer: {answer}.
evento.dropStarted: DROP is live! Type 'PEGUEI {code}' in chat (or !evento join) within {seconds}s to win {reward} points.
evento.dropWon: {user} claimed the drop first (code {code}) and won {reward} points!
evento.dropActive: Drop is running. Code: {code}. Time left: {seconds}s.
evento.noDrop: There is no active drop to claim.
evento.noQuiz: There is no active quiz right now.

lines: {target}, your alarm clock asked for a day off.
{target}, you are proof that coffee is magic.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
Some turtles can breathe through their backsides.
Sound travels faster in water than in air.
Why did the computer go to the doctor? It had a virus.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? It was outstanding in its field.
What did zero say to eight? Nice belt!
Why did the book go to therapy? It had too many problems.
Why did the music get arrested? It was too loud.
Why did the math book look sad? It had too many problems.
A small gesture brings a big return.
Positive change is on the way.
You are closer than you think.

greet.description: Sends a welcome message when a user joins.

keywordReply.description: Automatically replies to configured chat keywords.

antiSpam.description: Detects spam by similar repeated messages.
antiSpam.chatWarned: ⚠️ {user}, stop repeating messages or you will be removed.
antiSpam.kicked: {user} was kicked for spam. Next offense will result in a ban.
antiSpam.banned: {user} was banned for repeated spam after warning and kick.
antiSpam.cannotModeratePlatformRole: {user} has a platform role; automatic moderation actions do not work on this user.

liveEvents.description: Handles live quiz/drop events and rewards first winner.

autoSkip.description: Skips stalled tracks after they end.

afkRemoval.description: Removes AFK users from the waitlist.
afkRemoval.removed: Removed {user} from the waitlist for AFK ({duration}).

mediaCheck.description: Checks YouTube availability/age restriction and skips if needed.

log.noId: [mediaCheck] Unable to extract video ID. Keys: {keys}
log.apiResult: [mediaCheck] API result blocked={blocked} ageRestricted={ageRestricted} ageLimit={ageLimit} availability={availability}

waitlistJoinSnapshot.description: Saves snapshot immediately when user joins the waitlist.

waitlistLeaveSnapshot.description: Saves snapshot immediately when user leaves the waitlist.

roomLeaveSnapshot.description: Records last_left_at immediately when a user leaves the room.

closed.fewParticipants: Roulette closed: at least {min} participants required (only {count} joined).
fewParticipantsLines: Roulette got bored with only {count} participant(s). Need {min}.
{count} participant(s) is not enough for this chaos. Minimum is {min}.
No quorum for mayhem: {count}/{min}. Roulette closed.
closed.waitlistError: Roulette closed: failed to fetch waitlist: {error}
closed.noPermission: I don't have permission to move/remove {user}.

moveLines: CLICK! {name} survives and lands at position {pos}.
Chamber misfired: {name} gets moved to position {pos}.
Wild round: {name} stays alive but gets moved to {pos}.
shotLines: BANG! {name} is eliminated from the queue.
The loaded chamber found {name}. Out of queue.
End of the line for {name}: removed from queue.
No armor today. {name} is out of the queue.

fewParticipantsLines: Only {count} coward(s) showed up. Needed {min} for this to be fun.
What a disappointment: {count} person(s). Troll needs at least {min}.
{count} showed up. Troll Roulette wanted {min}. Pathetic.
With {count} soul(s) even the troll doesn't work. Where are the other {min}?

moveLines: Haha! {name} survived but got kicked to position {pos}. Classic.
Troll activated: {name} teleported without warning to spot {pos}.
Surprise! {name} lives, but now lives at position {pos}. 🤡
Chamber spun and {name} ended up at {pos}. Bad luck. Or good?
shotLines: BANG! {name} flew out of the queue. Bye! 👋
Troll found {name}. Removed with troll honors.
{name} was selected by the chaos algorithm. Out of queue!
Meant to be funny, but {name} will feel it. Removed.

fewParticipantsLines: Destiny needed {min} souls. Only {count} showed. Roulette closed.
The stars require {min} participants. Only {count} appeared.
With {count} person(s) destiny cannot operate. Minimum: {min}.
Vision of the future: {count} is not enough. Needed {min}.

moveLines: Destiny has spoken: {name} goes to position {pos}. There is no escape.
The stars aligned and {name} was pushed to spot {pos}.
